content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the full implementation across 7 changed source files. All 964 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and cargo fmt --check passes. The conflict marker detection in br_health.rs correctly distinguishes real conflict markers from marker-like substrings inside JSON values (tested). JSONL validation rejects non-object records and records without an id field. The per-mutation journal in br_process.rs provides crash-safe pending-mutation tracking with repo-wide file locking. sync_import correctly refuses to run while local mutations are pending. sync_own_dirty_if_beads_healthy correctly rejects foreign pending records to prevent publishing another workflow's half-finished mutations. The pre-operation health checks in service.rs and success_reconciliation.rs consistently gate mutations on healthy beads state. The stable adapter ID tokens (SHA-256 of project+bead+task context) in daemon_loop.rs and project.rs enable deterministic crash-recovery replay. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
